description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Sync ML models to Proxmox VM that triggers on push events to tags matching v*.*.* or model-deploy*. The workflow consists of two jobs: ml-models-sync and tfmodels-category-classifier-sync. Both jobs run on ubuntu-latest and use SSH to download ML models from GitHub releases to a Proxmox VM. The ml-models-sync job syncs multiple models to two different environments (robotoff-ml and robotoff-net/org), while the tfmodels-category-classifier-sync job syncs a single model to the robotoff-ml environment.
